news.title: Crypto is built for AI agents, not humans, says Alchemy's CEO
news.summary: Alchemy CEO Nikil Viswanathan argues the global financial system was designed for humans, but the next wave of commerce will be driven by AI agents that operate natively in crypto.

news.title: Trump defends crypto legislation at private event featuring boxer Mike Tyson, Tether CEO
news.summary: President Donald Trump, at a Mar-a-Lago gathering of investors in his self-branded memecoin, said crypto is mainstream and banks should back off the industry's bill.

news.title: BlackRock’s bitcoin ETF just hit a massive milestone that proves crypto is now a mainstream bet
news.summary: IBIT options open interest topped Deribit on Friday, signaling rapid institutional adoption of regulated crypto derivatives in the U.S.

news.title: Tell HN: An app is silently installing itself on my iPhone every day
news.summary: Every day for the past 3 days around 1pm EST the 'Headspace' app has been silently appearing on my iPhone (13 Pro). Automatic downloads are turned off and I've updated to the latest iOS since this sta...
